_comment: Source of truth for making section cards on homepage. Edit here to update.

cards.title: Gravity as a design tool
cards.description: Pigment weight, fluid chemistry, and a calculated pour sequence. Set the variables. Release control. See what gravity does with them.

cards.title: The Pax Box
cards.description: Built to hold cat accessories. Also functions as a side table. Motion-activated light inside. Cat-proof latch.

cards.title: A problem. A constraint.
cards.description: Magnets, velcro, resin, and whatever's at hand. The goal is always the same: remove the friction.
